mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.`name`, s.id_time_zone, t.`value` AS time_zone_value, s.start_date_time, s.end_date_time, s.cf_start_time, s.cf_end_time, s.ac_capacity, s.dc_capacity FROM site s INNER JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND s.`is_delete` = 0 AND s.cf_start_time IS NOT NULL AND s.cf_end_time IS NOT NULL AND ( (s.cf_start_time < s.cf_end_time AND HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', t.`value`)) >= s.cf_start_time + 1 AND HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', t.`value`)) <= s.cf_end_time - 1) OR (s.cf_start_time > s.cf_end_time AND ( HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', t.`value`)) >= s.cf_start_time + 1 OR HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', t.`value`)) <= s.cf_end_time - 1 )) ) AND s.run_on_server IN
#{item}
AND s.id IN (680)
GROUP BY s.id

SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.job_tablename, d.last_updated, d.id_device_group, dg.table_name AS device_group_table, s.start_date_time, s.end_date_time, s.data_send_time, t.`value` AS timezone_value, d.id AS id_device FROM device d INNER JOIN device_group dg ON dg.id = d.id_device_group INNER JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site AND s.`status` = 1 INNER JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.disable_alert = 1 AND d.id_site = #{id} AND dg.table_name IN ( 'model_SMP4_DP', 'model_SMP4_DPV1', 'model_MVPS_HUAWEI', 'model_OrionMX_Automation_Platform', 'model_protection_relay', 'model_protection_relay_v1', 'model_SUN2000330KTLH1', 'model_SUNGROW_SG6250HV_MV_V1', 'model_sungrow_pv_24h_scb', 'model_sungrow_sh6250hv_mv', 'model_advanced_energy_solaron', 'model_chint_solectria_inverter_class9725', 'model_PVH_Tbox', 'model_phoenix_contact_quint_ups', 'model_Kehua_SPI50_60K_inverter', 'model_xgi150', 'model_satcon_pvs357_inverter', 'model_abb_trio_class6210', 'model_xantrex_gt100_250_500', 'model_xantrex_gt500e' ) GROUP BY d.id
